sections.paragraph:
ἀναπαφλάζω (Eutecnius 1 p. 13, 9; Hesych.; Ps.-Caesarius of Naz., Dial. 3, 146 [MPG XXXVIII 1096] of the Tigris. The simplex form παφλάζω Hom. et al.) boil, bubble up ApcPt 9, 24.—DELG s.v. παφλάζω.

Eutecnius Eutecnius , date uncertain—List 5

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

Ps.-Caesarius Ps.-Caesarius , VI a.d.—List 5

MPG MPG = Migne, Patrologia Graeca—List 5

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 69
